headline: You're 72 days behind—Saturday decides if you recover
summary: Your 72-day deficit demands today's strict portion discipline and one focused cardio session to close your 0.13 kg/week pace gap.
details: Today: use Huel for all meals to eliminate snacking triggers—zero emotional eating allowed. Row or run for 45 minutes this morning before hunger excuses emerge. Saturday snacking cost you 72 days; reclaiming today's discipline directly funds your June 8th goal.
